_meta.description: D6 fixtures for hermes / tool-rendering. SERVER-SIDE backend tools (get_weather, search_flights, get_stock_price, roll_d20) registered in Hermes under the `hermes-showcase` toolset (integrations/hermes/showcase_tools.py), 1:1 with langgraph-python. The fixture only makes the agent EMIT each tool call (leg 1, gated on toolName); Hermes runs the REAL handler in-loop (deterministic result appended as a role:tool message), then the narration leg (gated on toolCallId, ordered before the emit leg — first-match-wins) fires once the tool result is present in the thread. The tool RESULT comes from the server handler, NOT the fixture. The per-tool useRenderTool render paints the card from the TOOL_CALL_RESULT. Pills (verbatim from suggestions.ts): "What's the weather in San Francisco?", "Find flights from SFO to JFK.", "What's the current price of AAPL?", "Roll a 20-sided die.", "Chain a few tools in this single turn: ...". D5 probe prompt: "weather in Tokyo".

fixtures._comment: Chain tools — follow-up after all 3 tools ran. Matches whichever chain toolCallId appears last in the request. MUST come before the toolCalls-emitting fixture so iteration 2 hits this branch instead of re-emitting.

match.userMessage: Chain a few tools in this single turn

response.content: Done — Tokyo is sunny, three flights found, and the d20 came up 11.

match.userMessage: Chain a few tools in this single turn

response.content: Done — Tokyo is sunny, three flights found, and the d20 came up 11.

match.userMessage: Chain a few tools in this single turn

response.content: Done — Tokyo is sunny, three flights found, and the d20 came up 11.

fixtures._comment: Chain tools — emit 3 tool calls in one assistant turn (get_weather Tokyo + search_flights SFO->Tokyo + roll_d20=11). MUST appear before the bare 'weather in Tokyo' fixture below; substring match would otherwise leak into this prompt.

match.userMessage: Chain a few tools in this single turn

fixtures._comment: Weather in SF — follow-up content after get_weather ran. MUST come before the tool-emitting fixture below (first-match-wins) so iteration 2 hits this branch instead of re-emitting.

match.userMessage: What's the weather in San Francisco?

response.content: San Francisco is currently 68°F and sunny with light winds.

match.userMessage: What's the weather in San Francisco?

fixtures._comment: Find flights — second leg (after search_flights tool result). MUST come BEFORE the first-leg fixture below; the second leg is uniquely identified by toolCallId.

match.userMessage: Find flights from SFO to JFK.

response.content: Three flights from SFO to JFK — United UA231 at 08:15 ($348), Delta DL412 at 11:20 ($312), and JetBlue B6722 at 17:05 ($289).

fixtures._comment: Find flights — first leg: emit search_flights tool call. Gated on toolName:search_flights (fires whenever the tool is registered, regardless of prior tool results in a multi-pill thread).

match.userMessage: Find flights from SFO to JFK.

fixtures._comment: Stock price — follow-up content after get_stock_price ran. MUST come before the tool-emitting fixture below so iteration 2 hits this branch.

match.userMessage: What's the current price of AAPL?

response.content: AAPL is trading at $338.37, down 2.96% on the day.

fixtures._comment: AAPL — first leg: emit get_stock_price with deterministic price_usd/change_pct so the handler echoes them into the card. Gated on toolName:get_stock_price.

match.userMessage: What's the current price of AAPL?

fixtures._comment: Roll a d20 — exactly 5 sequential roll_d20 calls returning [7, 14, 3, 19, 20]. Chained by toolCallId so the sequence is stateless across thread history. Specific-toolCallId fixtures MUST come before the userMessage-only fixture below; first-match-wins.

response.content: Rolled the d20 five times — landed on 20 on the final roll.

fixtures._comment: First roll. Matches the initial user prompt (no prior d20 tool result in this chain yet). Comes after the toolCallId-chained fixtures so iterations 2-6 hit those first; this fixture only matches when last-message.role=user.

D5 probe: 'weather in Tokyo' — follow-up content after get_weather ran. Keyed on the prior tool's id so it fires after iteration 1 regardless of thread history. MUST come BEFORE the tool-emitting fixtures.
D5 probe: 'weather in Tokyo' — first leg: emit get_weather. Gated on toolName so it fires whenever the tool is registered.
